channel.title: Smithsonian / USGS Weekly Volcanic Activity Report
channel.description: Weekly Volcanic Activity Report (fixture ridotta per i test offline).

item.title: Ambae (Vanuatu) - Report for 4 June-10 June 2026 - New Eruptive Activity
item.description:
The Wellington Volcanic Ash Advisory Center (VAAC) reported that emissions of ash-and-gas plumes from Ambae were identified during 4-5 June. The Alert Level remained at 3 (on a scale of 0-5).

Sources: Vanuatu Meteorology and Geohazards Department (VMGD)

item.title: Nevado de Longaví (Chile) - Report for 4 June-10 June 2026 - New Unrest
item.description:
The Servicio Nacional de Geología y Minería (SERNAGEOMIN) stated that seismicity at Nevado de Longaví gradually declined. The Alert Level remained at Yellow (the second lowest level on a four-color scale).

Sources: SERNAGEOMIN, SENAPRED

item.title: Aira (Japan) - Report for 4 June-10 June 2026 - Continuing Eruptive Activity
item.description:
The Japan Meteorological Agency (JMA) reported ongoing eruptive activity at Sakurajima during 1-8 June. The Alert Level remained at 3 (on a 5-level scale).

Source: Japan Meteorological Agency (JMA)

item.title: Senza Coordinate (Testland) - Report for 4 June-10 June 2026 - Continuing Unrest
item.description: Item privo di georss:point: deve essere scartato.

item.title: Senza Numero (Testland) - Report for 4 June-10 June 2026 - New Unrest
item.description: Item privo di numero vulcano nel guid: deve essere scartato.
